## Open Source & Security Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] My code follows the existing style, and I've run `npm run lint` (if available).
- [ ] I have included **unit tests** in `tests/engine-goals.test.mjs` for my changes.
- [ ] I have verified `npm test` passes locally.
- [ ] I have not included any sensitive information (API keys, secrets, personal data).
- [ ] (If adding a new Docker command) I have added a new objective to `tutorial.json`.
